descriptionHtml:
Excess 15 for sale 2022 | 5 Guest Cabins + 2 Crew Cabins | Tax Not Paid

Well-equipped with only 850 engine hours

If you are searching for a modern sailing catamaran that offers the perfect balance of performance, comfort, and style, the Excess 15 for sale 2022 stands as a worthy contender. Built in 2022, this vessel has been carefully maintained and remains in good condition, ready for her next owner and adventure. Designed by VPLP, with exterior styling by Patrick le Quément and interiors crafted by Nauta Design, the Excess 15 defines contemporary cruising with fresh aesthetics and practical solutions for life at sea.

Well equipped (Autopilot, Radar, AC, Fresh Water Maker, Generator, Bow & Stern Thruster, Bilge Pumps...)

Specifications:

General Information:

  • Model: Excess 15
  • Year: 2022
  • Builder: Excess
  • Flag of Registry: Spain
  • Condition: Good

Dimensions:

  • Overall length: 14.76 metres
  • Beam: 8.10 metres

Engines:

  • 2 x 2022 Yanmar 4JH57 (diesel, sail drive)
  • Power: 57hp each
  • Engine hours: approx. 850
  • Three-blade propellers

Performance:

  • Cruising speed: 8 knots
  • Sail plan includes mainsail with full battens, furling genoa, and cruising gennaker/spinnaker

Tanks:

  • Fuel: 2 x 520 litres
  • Fresh water: 2 x 240 litres
  • Black water: 4 x 120 litres

Accommodations:

  • Guest cabins: 5
  • Crew cabins: 2
  • Guest heads: 3

Safety and Comfort:

  • Life raft capacity: 16 persons
  • Numerous sun and spray protection awnings including rigid bimini, cockpit cover, lazy bag, and lazy jacks
  • Teak cockpit, exterior cushions, hydraulic swim platform, and cockpit shower

Electronics and Navigation:

  • AIS, compass, navigation centre, log, speedometer, radar detector, GPS, autopilot, chart plotter, radar, radio, VHF, depth sounder, wind speed and direction

Electrical and Internal Equipment:

  • Connection for shore power, generator, battery charger
  • Air conditioning, heating, hot water, electric and manual bilge pumps
  • Watermaker, freezer, fridge, oven, microwave
  • Electric WC

Additional Features:

  • Dinghy, swim ladder, cockpit table
  • Electric & hydraulic winches
  • Stern and bow thrusters
  • Radar reflector

This Excess 15 for sale 2022 represents an opportunity to acquire a modern multihull in good condition with a practical inventory, functional layout, and impressive sailing attributes. She’s ideal for sailors who want comfortable cruising, space for family or guests, and the ability to confidently undertake longer voyages. Viewing is recommended for those interested in a well-balanced catamaran ready for new horizons.
